playlists.name: Effortless Soul & Velvet Voices
playlists.description: Smooth pop-soul vibes blending modern warmth with emotional depth, perfect for a chill yet intimate listening session.

playlists.name: Golden Era Rock & Heartfelt Anthems
playlists.description: Classic rock staples and timeless folk-infused tunes that bring raw emotion and enduring energy for reflective moments.

playlists.name: Electronic Energy & Modern Pop Pulse
playlists.description: Upbeat contemporary EDM and pop tracks full of vibrant energy and catchy rhythms, perfect for high-energy moments and celebrations.

playlists.name: Dreamy Indie & Reflective Folk
playlists.description: Soft, ethereal indie folk and dream pop tracks that create a calm, introspective atmosphere suitable for quiet evenings or thoughtful moments.

playlists.name: Fresh Urban Beats & Latin Flavors
playlists.description: Rhythmic hip hop, reggaeton, and nu-perreo beats blending urban edge with vibrant Latin energy, perfect for energetic and dynamic vibes.

playlists.name: Moody Waves & Introspective Shadows
playlists.description: Darkwave and post-punk infused tracks with cold, introspective moods ideal for late-night listening and thoughtful reflection.

playlists.name: Pop Vibes with a Touch of Nostalgia
playlists.description: Bright and catchy pop tunes, with some nostalgic elements, suited for feel-good days and easy listening.
